name: Git Operations
description: Provides a safe, testable wrapper around Git CLI commands: running arbitrary git commands, capturing HEAD, committing with path specs, and listing changed files. Enforces safe practices via GitOperationGuard.

patterns: All git output captured as GitResult with exit code
dependencies: Used by TaskExecutionManager for auto-commit and hash capture
